summary.total_sentences_walked: Stage 10 round-1 spot-walked the load-bearing claims per Stage-13 anchor list (claims-reviewer-bundle-prompts.md §D3) and the synthesis-brief risk register; not the full sentence inventory. Coverage prioritises Class TN theorem-name references (load-bearing for the 'machine-checked' / 'first formalization' meta-claims), Class IA quantitative anchors (10^122 CC overshoot, 2.05e-77 EC torsion, 7e14 GW170817 falsification, 1/6000 Wen-deficit), Class HD tracked-hypothesis disclosure (Vergeles trio, H_HorizonBoundaryCondition, H_TopologicalOrderBeyondLG, H_TetradQuarkScalesNatural, H_RegimePartition), and Class CI citation registry consistency.
summary.agent_text: D3 Round-1 verdict RED. 21 BLOCKERs, 3 advisories. Three structural classes: (a) Class TN theorem-name drift across 17 sites including TWO ENTIRE MISSING MODULES (HoloQEC, HigherCurvatureStelle) plus a third (the wen_adw_factor_6000 theorem) whose existence is asserted but no decl found anywhere; module exists for ChiralityWall but `predicate` does not. (b) Class CI bibliography compile failure: \bibliography{bibliography} references a nonexistent bibliography.bib; paper_draft.aux has zero \bibcite entries; 38 of 61 cited keys also absent from CITATION_REGISTRY. (c) Class IA Lean-vs-prose 22-orders gap on the load-bearing CC overshoot claim: paper says ~10^122; Lean theorem proves only > 10^100. Class HD advisory: 11 D3-side tracked-hypothesis Lean Props are not enrolled in the Python HYPOTHESIS_REGISTRY (which carries only 7 keys, none from D3). 2.05e-77 EC torsion and 7e14 GW170817 anchors verified clean; pre-emptive grep confirmed zero stale 1.3e-114 references.

non_blocking_followups.summary: Class HD — Python HYPOTHESIS_REGISTRY contains only 7 keys, none from D3. Eleven D3-side tracked-hypothesis Lean Props (Vergeles trio, H_HorizonBoundaryCondition, H_TopologicalOrderBeyondLG, H_TetradQuarkScalesNatural, H_RegimePartition, H_NonlinearEFEHolds, H_NonlinearDiffInvariance, H_EinsteinCartanExtensionHolds, H_MicroscopicCoefficientMatch, H_VestigialModeIsGraviton, H_VerlindeKMLiteralSumDerivation) need enrolling. Paper prose discloses tracked-Prop status correctly in §28 Outlook so the disclosure-gap discipline is satisfied; this is a Python-side traceability follow-up (validate.py CHECK 16 paper_hypothesis_disclosure may need an update once enrolled).

Class IA — verify the synthesis-brief 'approximately 7×10^14' GW170817 falsification factor against the paper's 'approximately fourteen orders of magnitude'. 7e14 ≈ 14.85 orders; round-down to '14 orders' is consistent but the prose alternates between '~7×10^14' and '~14 orders' — pick one and use uniformly for clarity.

Class SD — paper §18 line 1327-1328 asserts pulsar-timing array bound `<= 10^60` and binary-BH bound `<= 10^50` for Stelle (alpha,beta,gamma) without citation. Either cite the constraint paper (Stein-Yagi-Yunes or similar) or hedge to 'order-of-magnitude estimate'.

Cross-bundle bridge — §6 GW170817 Δc/c bound and §8 M_c regime-partition criterion must match L1 / L3 character-for-character. Round-2 should validate cross-bundle consistency once L1 and L3 are reviewer-triple-closed (per memory both at GREEN as of 2026-05-01).

§9 §22.5 Cross-bundle anchor — D3 §9 sets canonical QEC-MTC cross-bridge framing for D4 §7 (D4 not yet drafted). Review-round-1 cannot validate against D4; flag as round-2 validation when D4 first-pass drafts.
